chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C. P. No. D — 1155 of 2022. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE[S] 27.04.2022. FOR ORDERS ON OFFICE OBJECTION. FOR ORDERS ON M.A.4307/2022. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE. None present. Petitioner being a vaccinator / public servant sought direction that all promotions without seniority list are illegal, void and ultra vires. However, he has not appeared since last two dates of hearing. He being a District Health Officer and being a public servant has an efficacious remedy under the law. This petition otherwise is not maintainable and the petitioner was put on notice to assist us regarding maintainability of the petition, however, he has failed to respond. Today however, since he is called absent dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE A.
